easy.title: Structure a Blog Page with <main>
easy.description: Create a simple blog post page that properly uses the <main> element. The page should have a header with navigation, a main content area containing at least two blog posts (using <article>), and a footer. Ensure the <main> element is correctly placed between header and footer.
easy.starterCode:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <title>My Blog</title>
</head>
<body>
  <!-- Add header with navigation here -->

  <!-- Add main element with article elements here -->

  <!-- Add footer here -->
</body>
</html>
easy.solution:
Home About Contact

medium.title: Accessible Landing Page with Skip Navigation
medium.description: Build a landing page that includes a functioning skip-navigation link targeting the <main> element. The page must have a navigation bar with at least 5 links, a main content area with multiple sections, and an aside sidebar. Style the skip link so it's visually hidden by default but appears when focused.

Skip to main content

hard.title: Single-Page Application with <main> Focus Management
hard.description: Build a mini SPA-style page with client-side routing that properly manages focus on the <main> element. The page should have a navigation bar with three 'pages' (Home, About, Contact). When clicking a nav link, the <main> content should update dynamically via JavaScript, and focus should be moved to the new heading inside <main>. Include proper ARIA attributes for live region announcements.
hard.starterCode:
Home About Contact
© 2026 SPA Demo
hard.solution:
Home About Contact
